title: Custom time for update reminders
excerpt: Please consider adding a ‘custom’ option to the update reminders feature, so we can choose a specific date/hour for the alert.

posts.author: andresabrandao (Andresa)
posts.cookedHtml: Please consider adding a ‘custom’ option to the update reminders feature, so we can choose a specific date/hour for the alert.

posts.author: PMJACK (Jack)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, this is important. It has already been raised here: Ability to set a custom date/time for a update reminder!
